summary: fetchCalendar looks up the user's team IDs and queries the calendar POST with teamID[] (plus a club-wide layer), using ISO datetimes and 30-day chunking.
reason: Live testing showed the minimal {start,end} calendar body returns only club-wide events; the dashboard scopes by teamID to get the user's training/games. Without this the flagship schedule commands return near-empty.
validated_outcome: Direct curl confirmed teamID[] returns the 6 training events vs 1 club event for the bare body; agenda 0 -> 12 events after the fix.
